title: Existing Runbook Review Lab Submission
description: Evidence template for reviewing and improving an existing ARIA runbook.

required_evidence.label: Runbook selected
required_evidence.description: Identify the existing runbook reviewed, such as server restart, SSH key collision, backup, disaster recovery, or Zammad deployment.

required_evidence.label: What it covers
required_evidence.description: Summarize what the runbook is supposed to help someone do.

required_evidence.label: Strengths
required_evidence.description: Identify what is already clear, useful, or safe in the runbook.

required_evidence.label: Gaps or risks
required_evidence.description: Identify anything unclear, missing, risky, outdated, or hard for a beginner to follow.

required_evidence.label: Improvement recommendations
required_evidence.description: Recommend specific edits or additions that would make the runbook safer or easier to use.

required_evidence.label: Validation plan
required_evidence.description: Explain how the runbook should be tested before being trusted.

required_evidence.label: Professional summary
required_evidence.description: Write a short review summary with approve, revise, or block recommendation.

safety_rules: Do not paste secrets from any runbook or system.
Do not approve unclear operational steps without validation.
Call out destructive or risky procedures clearly.
